office_does: The county treasurer collects and distributes taxes, manages public funds and investments, and provides taxpayer services.
race_blurb: Appointed incumbent Brittany Pearson faces Randy Lewis, for whom the dossier contains filing information but no identity-safe professional biography or platform.

candidates.summary: Republican candidate whose dossier verifies his filing but provides no identity-safe professional biography or detailed platform.
Appointed treasurer with 25 years of experience in the Treasurer's Office.
highlights: Had worked in the office for 25 years when she announced [S2]

experience.basis: Appointment as treasurer after 25 years in the office establishes a maximal proven-record profile.
